---
title: "EPPS 6354 Information Management | Spring 2026"
format: html
---

## Information Management Project
### Cosmic Trajectories | Spring 2026
#### Project Pitch | Feb 2026
<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide CV</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354ProjectProposal.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

#### Pitch Deck | Feb 2026
<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide CV</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354PitchDeck.pptx" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

#### Progress Report | Mar 2026
<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide CV</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6354ProjectProgress.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

## Assignments

-   [Assignment 1 - February 5th, 2026](6354-A1.qmd)

-   [Assignment 2 - February 12th, 2026](6354-A2.qmd)

-   [Assignment 3 - February 19th, 2026](6354-A3.qmd)

-   [Assignment 4 - February 26th, 2026](6354-A4.qmd)

-   [Assignment 5 - March 5th, 2026](6354-A5.qmd)

-   [Assignment 6 - March 26th, 2026](6354-A6.qmd)
